context: Tests whether the agent integrates Hotjar behavioral event tracking using the correct window.hj API, instruments scroll depth at the four standard milestones with deduplication, tracks required field abandonment on blur, and implements the CRO audit checklist using the correct interface and standard check IDs.

checklist.name: window.hj event API
checklist.description: Sends behavioral events using window.hj?.('event', ...) or window.hj('event', ...) syntax — not a different Hotjar API method or a custom abstraction that omits the hj call

checklist.name: Scroll depth milestones
checklist.description: Fires scroll depth events at exactly 25%, 50%, 75%, and 100% scroll milestones (all four must be present)

checklist.name: Scroll deduplication
checklist.description: Uses a Set (or equivalent deduplication mechanism) so each scroll milestone fires only once per page load, not on every scroll event

checklist.name: Field abandonment on blur
checklist.description: Detects required field abandonment by listening to the 'blur' event on form inputs (not submit or change) and checks that the field is both empty and marked required

checklist.name: Field abandonment hj event
checklist.description: Fires a Hotjar event (via window.hj) when a required field is abandoned, not just a console log or internal counter

checklist.name: AuditCheck interface
checklist.description: Defines a typed audit check data structure with at minimum: an id (string), a description, an impact level, and a check function

checklist.name: Impact levels high/medium/low
checklist.description: The audit check impact field uses exactly three levels: 'high', 'medium', and 'low' (not numeric scores or other labels)

checklist.name: guest-checkout check
checklist.description: The audit checklist includes a check with id 'guest-checkout' (or very close variant) that verifies guest checkout availability

checklist.name: trust-badges check
checklist.description: The audit checklist includes a check with id 'trust-badges' (or very close variant) that verifies security/trust signals near the payment step

checklist.name: error-messages-inline check
checklist.description: The audit checklist includes a check with id 'error-messages-inline' (or very close variant) that verifies inline (not toast/alert) form validation errors

checklist.name: autofill-support check
checklist.description: The audit checklist includes a check with id 'autofill-support' (or very close variant) that verifies autocomplete attributes on address fields

checklist.name: cta-above-fold check
checklist.description: The audit checklist includes a check with id 'cta-above-fold' (or very close variant) that verifies the primary CTA is visible without scrolling on mobile

checklist.name: Audit findings: guest checkout
checklist.description: audit-findings.md identifies forced account registration (no guest checkout) as a failing check and cites it as a top recommendation, noting its outsized impact on abandonment

checklist.name: Audit findings: trust signals
checklist.description: audit-findings.md identifies the absence of trust badges/security indicators near the payment form as a failing check

checklist.name: Audit findings: inline validation
checklist.description: audit-findings.md identifies the banner/non-inline error messages as a failing check and recommends per-field inline validation
